description: 功能開關 — Feature Flag、Beta 設定、A/B Testing — Ambiguous
generation_guidelines: Generate feature flag values that could leak business logic but are not directly exploitable. Cover: A/B test variant assignments, beta feature toggles, maintenance mode flags, rollout percentages, canary deployment flags, experiment names, whitelist/blacklist feature states, deprecated API warnings. These are medium value because they reveal roadmap but aren't credentials. Paths: root.features, root.flags, root.experiments, root.launchdarkly, root.config.rollout.

examples.text: Path: root.features | Key: new_checkout_flow | Struct: Leaf | Val: "true"
Path: root.experiments.a_b | Key: variant | Struct: Leaf | Val: "treatment_group_b"
Path: root.config.maintenance | Key: api_v2_deprecated | Struct: Leaf | Val: "true"
